name: [UPDATE] FPE- X Au
description:
"Beware of the shadows..."

Hey guys, Notepad here...

So uh yeah, what is this Au, you may ask... Well... To be honest, I don't really know much information about it. All i know that this is like a shadow infection or something so yeah...

And just want to be clear that this bot may be a bit bad for you, so if you don't like it then please no hate, okay?

And also sometimes, it's not my fault if the bot starts talking as you, not following the plot, etc, it's purely because of the AI prompts, if this happens try to dislike the comment or create a new chat for better prompts.

And also yeah... I tried my best, i will update the bot if i need to fix something. And also... There are some characters like Petunia, Kevin, Chip and other that aren't in the bot. Well it's because the original creator of this Au said that they will release the other characters after they will post the animation that is currently on progress... So yeah, have fun i guess with this bot?

Original Au is made by Aimix on Twitter
creator: Notepad...
